instruction:
In a triangle $ABC,$ if ${b}^{2}{\cos}^{2}{B}={a}^{2}+{c}^{2},$ then $B$ is

Options:
A. in \left[\dfrac{\pi}{4}, \dfrac{\pi}{3}\right]
B. $\dfrac{\pi}{3}$
C. $\dfrac{\pi}{6}$
D. in $\left[\dfrac{\pi}{4},\dfrac{\pi}{2}\right]$
E. in \left[\dfrac{\pi}{3},\dfrac{\pi}{2}\right]
F. in \left[\dfrac{\pi}{2}, \pi\right]
G. in \left(0, \dfrac{\pi}{2}\right)
H. acute
I. $$\dfrac{\pi}{2}$$
J. obtuse
